channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vance Says He Trusts Actions in Iran Negotiations
item.description: Vice President JD Vance told reporters Monday that actions, not words, matter in peace talks with Iran.

item.title: Federal judge dismisses DOJ subpoenas for Tim Walz and other Minnesota officials
item.description: A federal judge has invalidated DOJ subpoenas issued to Minnesota Governor Tim Walz and other officials as part of an investigation into cooperation with federal immigration authorities.

item.title: Judge blocks Trump administration's 'haphazard' voter-screening database
item.description: A judge has halted a Trump administration voter-screening database that she said collected private information in an attempt to remove non-citizens from voter rolls.

item.title: WATCH: The Points Guy offers summer travel tips
item.description: Brian Kelly, known as the Points Guy, shares advice on how to maximize your summer travel experience.
